messages.session_start_guidance: Run HEARTBEAT.md checks. Call mcp_heartbeat_session_reflect if thresholds trigger.
messages.post_tool_reflect_instruction: Call mcp_heartbeat_session_reflect, then continue. If unavailable, try tool_search once. Otherwise run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py if it exists. If both fail, review scope and identity files manually.
messages.stop_reflect_instruction: Call mcp_heartbeat_session_reflect before stopping. If unavailable, try tool_search once. Otherwise run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py if it exists.
messages.accepted_reason: User retro: run mcp_heartbeat_session_reflect, persist, stop. If unavailable, try tool_search once. Otherwise run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py if it exists.
